MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Gregory D. McDonald, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Plaintiff's counsel sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/9/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Zackery P. Morazzini, Esq., Attorney General's Office, (916) 323-6311, appeared telephonically through Court Call for Defendant and Moving Party Department of General Services
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Attorney Morazzini is to prepare a proposed order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Withhold On Stop Notice And For Interest, Penalties, Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Margaret A. Seltzer, Esq., Seltzer Law Group, 425 California St., 19th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94104, (415) 362-5495 appearing on behalf of defendant and moving party Vahdani Construction Company.
Kathleen A. Lynch, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Department of Justice, Office of the Attorney General, 1300 I Street, Suite 1101, PO Box 944255, Sacramento, CA, 94244-2550, (916) 445-7480, on behalf of defendant and opposing party and opposing party State of California. Gregory D. McDonald, Esq., Law Office of Gregory D McDonald, 12 South 1st Street, #417, San Jose, CA 95113, (408) 971-6666, appearing for plaintiff and opposing pary Syserco.

RULING:
After argument the Court modified its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION For Release Of Withhold On Stop Notice And For Interest, Penalties, Attorneys Fees And Costs was taken under submission. Honorable James L. Warren. Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (301/AC)
